name: disaster_response_heat_dome_stresses_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Disaster Response, the situation tagged internally around disaster response heat dome stresses millhaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Gideon Kaur
agents.identity: I am Gideon Kaur, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Disaster Response. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Kaur
agents.identity: I am Sana Kaur, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Disaster Response. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Gideon Kaur must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Gideon Kaur do?
